visual_description: A close-up, shaky shot focuses on a person's hand gripping a light blue metal railing. The hand is pale and appears to be in motion, as if the person is climbing or moving quickly. The background is dark and indistinct, with a greenish, moody lighting that casts deep shadows. In the upper left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man in a dimly lit room. He has dark hair and is wearing a suit jacket, a light-colored collared shirt, and a dark tie. He has an earpiece in his right ear and is holding a black walkie-talkie to his mouth, speaking into it with a serious expression. The background is dark, with a framed picture and some out-of-focus elements suggesting an office or control room environment. The white text "风行网" remains in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic electronic beat, creating a suspenseful and urgent atmosphere. A man speaks in a low, serious, and commanding voice, his tone firm and direct as he gives an order. "他们说货，准备装人。" (They say the goods are here, prepare to load people.)
